seoTitle: Wellington Mill vs Welshpool — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wellington Mill and Welshpool. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wellington Mill vs Welshpool: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wellington Mill and Welshpool.
heading: Wellington Mill vs Welshpool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wellington Mill, Western Australia and Welshpool, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wellington Mill has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Welshpool (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wellington Mill or Welshpool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wellington Mill has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Welshpool scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wellington Mill scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Welshpool scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wellington Mill or Welshpool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wellington Mill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
